segments.text: Why do You stand afar off, O Lord? Why do You hide in times of trouble?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The wicked in his pride persecutes the poor;
Let them be caught in the plots which they have devised.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For the wicked boasts of his heart's desire;
He blesses the greedy and renounces the Lord.
The wicked in his proud countenance does not seek God; God is in none of his thoughts.
His ways are always prospering; Your judgments are far above, out of his sight; As for all his enemies, he sneers at them.
I shall not be moved; I shall never be in adversity.
segments.speaker: The Wicked

segments.text: His mouth is full of cursing and deceit and oppression; Under his tongue is trouble and iniquity.
He sits in the lurking places of the villages; In the secret places he murders the innocent; His eyes are secretly fixed on the helpless.
He lies in wait secretly, as a lion in his den; He lies in wait to catch the poor; He catches the poor when he draws him into his net.
So he crouches, he lies low, That the helpless may fall by his strength.
God has forgotten; He hides His face; He will never see.
segments.speaker: The Wicked

segments.text: Arise, O Lord! O God, lift up Your hand! Do not forget the humble.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Why do the wicked renounce God?
You will not require an account.
segments.speaker: The Wicked

segments.text: But You have seen, for You observe trouble and grief, To repay it by Your hand.
The helpless commits himself to You; You are the helper of the fatherless.
Break the arm of the wicked and the evil man; Seek out his wickedness until You find none.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord is King forever and ever; The nations have perished out of His land.
Lord, You have heard the desire of the humble; You will prepare their heart; You will cause Your ear to hear,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: To do justice to the fatherless and the oppressed, That the man of the earth may oppress no more.
segments.speaker: David
